zh.lifeSummary: 當William Clarent於1378年出生在英國多瑟特時，他的父親William De Carent34歲，母親Alice De Toomer29歲。他於1404年與Margaret Stourton在英國英格蘭多瑟特結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1476年4月8日在英國薩默塞特享年98歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Clarent于1378年出生在英国多瑟特时，他的父亲William De Carent34岁，母亲Alice De Toomer29岁。他于1404年与Margaret Stourton在英国英格兰多瑟特结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1476年4月8日在英国薩默塞特享年98岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clarent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: relationship name from the female personal names Claret, Clarot, diminutives of Latin Clara, Old French Claire.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Clarent was born in 1378, in Dorset, England, his father, William De Carent, was 34 and his mother, Alice De Toomer, was 29. He married Margaret Stourton in 1404, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 8 April 1476, in Somerset, England, at the age of 98.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Clarent est né en 1378, à Dorset, Angleterre, son père, William De Carent, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Alice De Toomer, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Stourton en 1404, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 avril 1476, à Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 98 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Clarent 1378 in Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William De Carent 34 und seine Mutter Alice De Toomer 29. Er hat 1404 in Dorset, England, United Kingdom Margaret Stourton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. April 1476 im Alter von 98 Jahren in Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Clarent è nato il nel 1378 nel Dorset, England, il suo padre, William De Carent, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Alice De Toomer, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Stourton nel 1404, nel Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 8 aprile 1476, nel Somerset, England, all'età di 98 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Clarentが1378年にイギリスドールセトで生まれた時，父William De Carentは34歳，母Alice De Toomerは29歳であった。1404年にイギリスイギリスドールセトでMargaret Stourtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1476年4月8日にイギリスソメルセトで98歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Clarent(이)가 1378년 영국 도르세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Carent(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice De Toomer(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 Margaret Stourton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1476년 4월 8일 영국 서머세트에서 98세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Clarent nasceu em 1378, em Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, William De Carent, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Alice De Toomer, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Stourton em 1404, em Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de abril de 1476, em Somerset, Inglaterra, com 98 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Clarent родился в 1378 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени William De Carent было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Alice De Toomer, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Stourton в 1404 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 8 апреля 1476 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 98 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Clarent nació en 1378, en Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, William De Carent, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Alice De Toomer, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Margaret Stourton en 1404, en Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de abril de 1476, en Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 98 años.
